data.name: Intro
data.value: The API is for automation: scripts, integrations, CI pipelines or other systems that need to work with Harpyx without using the browser. Most users do not need it for normal day-to-day work.

data.name: ApiKeysCreate
data.value: Create keys from the API Keys page after signing in.

data.name: ApiKeysShownOnce
data.value: The full key is shown only once, when it is created.

data.name: ApiKeysUseHeader
data.value: Use the key in requests with

data.name: ApiKeysRevoke
data.value: Revoke keys you no longer use.

data.name: PermissionsDescription
data.value: Each key should only receive the permissions it needs. This limits what an automation can do if the key is leaked or misused.

data.name: OrganizeWorkDescription
data.value: Create workspaces and projects when your process needs to prepare them automatically.

data.name: MoveDocumentsDescription
data.value: Upload files into projects or delete documents when your integration manages the document lifecycle.

data.name: AskQuestionsDescription
data.value: Query a project and receive an answer based on the prepared project documents.

data.name: DetailsDescription
data.value: The public help explains the idea. The exact endpoints, examples and Swagger page are available after sign-in from the API area.
